center.name: 莱特岛
center.summary: 莱特岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联11种鸟类，包括Black-faced coucal、Philippine eagle-owl、Pinsker's hawk-eagle等11种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is endemic to the Philippines found in the islands of Mindanao, Basilan Dinagat Islands Bohol, Leyte, Biliran and Samar

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in tropical moist lowland forest but is now feared locally extinct in a large part of its range including Negros, Panay, Leyte, Luzon and Polilio

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The northern silvery kingfisher (Ceyx flumenicola) is a species of bird in the family Alcedinidae that is endemic to the Philippines being found in the Visayas on the islands of Bohol, Leyte and Samar

birds.label: 分布于
